incidents.name: Elevated errors on Claude.ai, API, Claude Code

incident_updates.body: This incident has been resolved.
We have seen success rates for login to Claude.ai, including via Claude Code, stabilize and are working to fully resolve this issue. We will provide an update shortly.
Claude.ai and Platform are down. Login for Claude Code does not work via Claude.ai.

The Claude API has fully recovered as of 8:01 PT / 16:01 UTC. We are currently working on mitigating the ongoing errors for Claude AI. Claude Code users who are logged in are still able to use it, but logging in is still broken.
The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.
We are continuing to investigate this issue.
We are seeing increased errors on Claude.ai, API, and Claude Code

incidents.name: Degraded service on usage and analytics admin API endpoints

incident_updates.body: This incident has been resolved.
A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.

Root cause identified. Fixes have been merged and are progressing through our deployment pipeline. Intermittent 503 errors on usage and analytics admin API endpoints may continue until the rollout completes. We will update once the fix is live in production.
We are investigating reports of degraded performance affecting the usage and analytics admin API endpoints. We will provide an update as soon as possible.

We have identified the issue affecting Claude.ai and Claude Code logins. We are working to apply a fix for this issue, and will provide an additional update as soon as possible.
We are continuing to investigate elevated errors on Claude.ai, primarily affecting login. We will provide an update as soon as possible.
We are currently investigating this issue.
Email login was broken between approximately 3:46 PM and 4:52 PM PDT on April 10, 2026.

incident_updates.body: The issue affecting requests to non-Opus models has been resolved.
We have identified the current issue as affecting requests to models other than Claude Opus 4.6, and are working to fully resolve this issue. We will provide additional updates shortly.
We are investigating reports of elevated errors on requests to Claude across all products. We will provide an update as soon as possible.

incident_updates.body: Between April 2 and April 10, some users who were not signed in to Claude.ai (web, mobile, desktop) were not able to access some Claude.ai sharing links.

incidents.name: Elevated errors on Claude.ai, API, Claude Code

We are currently investigating an issue with authentication across multiple product surfaces.

From 14:32–15:12 UTC, we saw elevated errors impacting various Claude services, including Claude.ai and Claude Code authentication. These errors have been resolved.
We have applied a fix and success rates have returned to normal. We are continuing to monitor closely to ensure there are no further issues.

We have identified an issue resulting in elevated errors on Claude.ai, including desktop and mobile. Users may experience errors when attempting to login, engaging with voice mode, or completing chats with Claude. We are working to resolve this issue as soon as possible.
This incident has been resolved.
We are currently investigating this issue.

From 15:00–16:30 UTC on April 6, we saw elevated errors on login for Claude.ai and Claude Code. This issue also affected some Claude.ai conversations and other product functionality such as voice mode. This issue is now resolved.
We have applied a fix, and are seeing success rates recover across affected services. We are continuing to monitor to ensure there is no recurrence of issues.

incidents.name: Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.6 elevated error rate

incident_updates.body: Between 10:09 and 10:31 PDT, Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.6 experienced elevated error rates across most product surfaces.

incidents.name: Elevated errors on requests to Claude Sonnet 4.6

incident_updates.body: This incident has been resolved.
We are currently investigating an issue resulting in elevated errors on requests to Claude Sonnet 4.6. We will provide an update as soon as possible.

incidents.name: Errors on the Claude.ai desktop application

incident_updates.body: This incident has been resolved.

We have identified an issue which results in the Claude.ai desktop application returning an error when attempting to connect. We are working to resolve this issue as quickly as possible, and the Claude.ai website is unaffected.

incidents.name: Elevated errors on requests to Claude Opus 4.6

incident_updates.body: This incident has been resolved.
We have identified an issue resulting in elevated errors on requests to Claude Opus 4.6, and are working to resolve this. We will provide an update as soon as possible.

incidents.name: Elevated timeouts on requests to Claude Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6

incident_updates.body: We have identified an issue which resulted in elevated rates of timeouts when making requests to Claude Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 from 17:45 UTC on March 31 through 05:52 UTC on April 1. This issue has been resolved.

incidents.name: Elevated errors and latency on Claude Haiku 4.5

incident_updates.body: This incident has been resolved.
A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.
We are currently investigating this issue.

incidents.name: Unavailable connectors in Claude.ai desktop applications

incident_updates.body: We have resolved an issue that resulted in the unavailability of connectors in the Claude.ai desktop application. Affected connectors were removed from organization allowlists, and can be manually re-added while we work to automatically restore impacted allowlists.

We have identified an issue which has resulted in some Claude.ai connectors becoming unavailable within the desktop application. We are working to restore access to these extensions, and will provide an update as soon as possible.

incident_updates.body: This incident has been resolved.
We are continuing to work on a fix for this issue.
The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.
This incident has been resolved.

incidents.name: Dispatch sessions not responding in Claude Desktop

incident_updates.body: The issue affecting Dispatch has been resolved. We fixed an underlying issue that prevent the agent from sending responses to user messages. Please update to Claude desktop app 1.1.9493. We apologize for any inconvenience caused.

We've identified an issue in the latest Claude Desktop release (Claude 1.1.9310) where Dispatch sessions stop responding. Messages sent to Dispatch are received and processed, but replies do not appear in the conversation. We have identified the cause and are working on a fix. As a workaround, you can continue using standard Cowork sessions, which are unaffected.

incidents.name: Elevated errors on Opus 4.6 Fast Mode

incident_updates.body: This incident has been resolved.
A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.
We are currently investigating this issue.

On March 26–27, 2026, customers experienced elevated error rates when using Claude Opus 4.6 and Claude Sonnet 4.6. The issue was caused by a networking performance degradation within our infrastructure that disrupted communication between components of our serving stack. We resolved the incident by migrating the affected workloads to healthy infrastructure, restoring normal service by 9:30 AM PT on March 27.
This incident has been mitigated as of 9:30 PT / 16:30 UTC.
As of 6:40 PT / 13:40 UTC our error rate has returned to the baseline. We are still monitoring the current situation.

We have mitigated the main issue and the error rate for Opus 4.6 is hovering around 0.4% which is still high, but much better than the performance during the previous hours. We are waiting for a more permanent fix to land in the near future.
As of 5:00 PT / 12:00 UTC Sonnet 4.6 is now healthy. We are still working to fix Opus 4.6.
Sonnet 4.6 is also showing elevated errors.
We are continuing to investigate the ongoing incident.
We are currently investigating this issue.
